requirement_topic.en: JIS Performance Standards — JIS B 8615 and JIS C 9612

summary.en: Japan market documentation for air-source heat pumps and air conditioners commonly references Japanese Industrial Standards such as JIS B 8615 for package air conditioners / heat pumps and JIS C 9612 for room air conditioners. These standards support Japanese performance declarations, capacity ratings, APF-related calculations, noise and test-condition disclosures, and customer-facing catalogues. The applicable JIS edition and product scope must be confirmed for each model.
summary.zh: 日本市场的空气源热泵和空调器文件通常引用JIS B 8615（整体式空调器/热泵）和JIS C 9612（房间空调器）等日本产业标准。这些标准支持日本性能声明、能力额定值、APF相关计算、噪声和测试条件披露以及面向客户的目录。每个型号均须确认适用JIS版本和产品范围。
summary.zht: 日本市場的空氣源熱泵和空調器文件通常引用JIS B 8615（整體式空調器/熱泵）和JIS C 9612（房間空調器）等日本產業標準。這些標準支持日本性能聲明、能力額定值、APF相關計算、噪聲和測試條件披露以及面向客戶的目錄。每個型號均須確認適用JIS版本和產品範圍。

summary.en: Chinese heat-pump and room-air-conditioner documentation often relies on GB/T 7725, GB 21455, GB/T 25127, and related GB methods. These Chinese standards may cover similar capacity, COP, APF, and safety objectives, but they do not create automatic equivalence to Japanese JIS test conditions, classification, or consumer-facing performance declarations.
summary.zh: 中国热泵和房间空调器文件通常依据GB/T 7725、GB 21455、GB/T 25127及相关GB方法。这些中国标准可能覆盖类似的能力、COP、APF和安全目标，但不能自动等同于日本JIS测试条件、分类或面向消费者的性能声明。
summary.zht: 中國熱泵和房間空調器文件通常依據GB/T 7725、GB 21455、GB/T 25127及相關GB方法。這些中國標準可能覆蓋類似的能力、COP、APF和安全目標，但不能自動等同於日本JIS測試條件、分類或面向消費者的性能聲明。

gap.en: Chinese test reports should be mapped clause-by-clause against JIS B 8615 or JIS C 9612 before reuse. Where test conditions, seasonal calculation, sound measurement, rated capacity bands, or catalogue disclosure requirements differ, Japan-specific retesting or recalculation is needed.
gap.zh: 中国测试报告在复用前应逐条映射至JIS B 8615或JIS C 9612。如测试条件、季节性计算、噪声测量、额定能力区间或目录披露要求不同，则需要日本特定重新测试或重新计算。
gap.zht: 中國測試報告在複用前應逐條映射至JIS B 8615或JIS C 9612。如測試條件、季節性計算、噪聲測量、額定能力區間或目錄披露要求不同，則需要日本特定重新測試或重新計算。

mandatory_status.target: JIS use may be required by linked regulations, certification schemes, procurement specifications, or Top Runner measurement rules; verify current edition and scope
mandatory_status.cn: GB standards apply according to Chinese domestic-market category; not equivalent to JIS by default

source.publisher: Japanese Industrial Standards Committee (JISC), Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry

compliance_verdict.en: Gap — JIS B 8615 and JIS C 9612 references must be checked for the model; GB reports are not automatically reusable without JIS mapping, retesting, or recalculation.
compliance_verdict.zh: 存在差距——须按型号核查JIS B 8615和JIS C 9612引用；GB报告未经JIS映射、重新测试或重新计算不能自动复用。
compliance_verdict.zht: 存在差距——須按型號核查JIS B 8615和JIS C 9612引用；GB報告未經JIS映射、重新測試或重新計算不能自動複用。
